what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG video camera icon with a rounded rectangular body and a side lens shape, using stroke-only currentColor styling.
observations: Root svg declares the SVG namespace and viewBox 0 0 24 24.
The icon has fill set to none and stroke set to currentColor.
Stroke width is 1.5 with round line caps and round line joins.
The camera body is a rect at x=3 y=7 with width 13, height 10, and rx=1.5.
The side lens is a closed path from the body toward x=21.
conventions: Avoids ids, classes, embedded styles, scripts, and metadata.
notes: A compact line icon for representing video or camera functionality.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be supplied where this SVG is embedded?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a video camera icon, and the SVG content draws a video camera icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to serve as a reusable UI icon that adapts to surrounding color through currentColor.
contribution: Contributes a simple stroke-only video camera glyph that a fused system would keep as an adaptable media or recording icon asset.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor SVG line icon depicting a video camera with a rounded body and side lens.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing video camera, recording, or media capture actions in a reusable icon set.
